title: ageratina cylindrica
intro: Ageratina cylindrica, also known as Mexican mint or yerba de pasmo, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ageratina cylindrica include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Ageratina cylindrica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and soothe respiratory issues.
